title: Idempotency key handling

commands.summary: Final S10 closeout gate rerun after evidence creation

commands.command: claude -p --add-dir /tmp --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --no-session-persistence --tools Read --disallowedTools Bash,Edit,Write,MultiEdit,NotebookEdit,Grep,Glob --output-format json
commands.summary: Single valid read-only S10 Claude review completed against /tmp/lfos-rp00-p02-m04-s10-review-packet.diff.

notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.

All commands are local validation, parser, test, Claude read-only review, or git whitespace checks; none execute service logic, create runtime routes, invoke Claude runtime review, write review queues, write review assignments, send review notifications, replace human approval, evaluate runtime permission, call an AuthZ evaluator, run a permission engine, append audit ledgers, write audit events, persist idempotency records, write idempotency stores, acquire locks, write databases, write storage, or persist product state.
Pre-closeout npm run rp00:control-plane:validate failed only because S10 evidence files were intentionally not created yet; this command is rerun after evidence creation as the final gate.

Claude C00 valid review completed once using claude-opus-4-8 effort=max read-only packet review. Claude rated the S10 implementation GO with no P0/P1/P2 findings. Two P3 notes are informational and explicitly deferred.

evidence_summary.claude_review_dependency: C00 actual claude-opus-4-8 max read-only review required before production_ready
evidence_summary.human_approval_boundary: Human approval is not replaced or synthesized by this deterministic synthetic Idempotency key handling path because no sensitive production mutation, client-facing output, external sharing, finance action, real data operation, runtime execution, permission engine execution, AuthZ evaluation, audit write, idempotency store write, lock acquisition, storage write, database write, or product-state write occurs.
evidence_summary.idempotency_key_handling: S10 prechecks the S09 State transition enforcement result as metadata only, emits canonical idempotency metadata, fails closed on unsafe keys, unsafe claims, and wrong upstream markers, preserves model and read-only review semantics, keeps RP00.P02.M04 open, and hands off to RP00.P02.M04.S11.
